description: Single-commit v0.4.4 fix that added an interactive AskUserQuestion menu to /glm:setup when the plugin is already fully configured (both preset_id + has_api_key set) and the user runs bare /glm:setup. Also renamed the npm scope @skylab/glm-plugin-cc → glm-plugin-cc. Chosen as the C1 small-diff fixture because the scope is tightly bounded (one new UX branch + one rename + release-card rewrite) and we curated it ourselves, making ground-truth curation straightforward.
notes: release_card.md rewrite is the dominant byte count (326 insertions). commands/setup.md is the actual functional change (19-line skill-prompt decision tree addition for 'both set + empty ARGUMENTS' branch). Manifest files get 2-line version bumps each.
